CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT, dt DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, DATE '2020-01-01');
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (2, DATE '2020-02-15');
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (3, DATE '2020-03-30');
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (4, DATE '2020-12-31');
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (5, DATE '2021-06-15');
SELECT month(dt) FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT month(dt) FROM test_dates WHERE id = 2;
SELECT month(dt) FROM test_dates WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3);
SELECT id, month(dt) AS month_num FROM test_dates WHERE month(dt) BETWEEN 1 AND 6;
CREATE TABLE timestamp_test (id INT, ts TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO timestamp_test VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2020-07-22 10:30:00');
INSERT INTO timestamp_test VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '2021-08-15 15:45:00');
SELECT month(ts) FROM timestamp_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT month(ts) FROM timestamp_test WHERE id IN (1, 2);
CREATE TABLE combined_test (id INT, dt DATE, ts TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO combined_test VALUES (1, DATE '2020-09-01', TIMESTAMP '2020-10-12 12:00:00');
INSERT INTO combined_test VALUES (2, DATE '2021-11-11', TIMESTAMP '2021-12-20 20:00:00');
SELECT month(dt) + month(ts) AS total_month FROM combined_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, month(dt) AS month_date, month(ts) AS month_timestamp FROM combined_test;
CREATE TABLE multi_join_test (id INT, sale_date DATE);
INSERT INTO multi_join_test VALUES (1, DATE '2022-01-15');
INSERT INTO multi_join_test VALUES (2, DATE '2022-02-18');
INSERT INTO multi_join_test VALUES (3, DATE '2022-03-22');
SELECT m.id, month(m.sale_date) AS sale_month FROM multi_join_test m JOIN test_dates td ON month(m.sale_date) = month(td.dt);
SELECT month(dt) FROM test_dates UNION SELECT month(sale_date) FROM multi_join_test;
